page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated physical cores utilizing the AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a thread-per-core ratio of 1.0, each of the 96 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 192.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB memory-per-core ratio.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs represents a clear tradeoff, positioning this instance purely for non-graphical, network-reliant compute workloads. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high compute-to-RAM density provide predictable execution times for CPU-bound tasks without the overhead of shared-core architectures.

The hardware profile of the ecs.c8a.24xlarge makes it suitable for compute-intensive workloads that benefit from high core counts and dedicated CPU resources. Appropriate workloads include batch processing, scientific modeling, video encoding, distributed analytics, and large-scale web serving where memory demands do not exceed the 2.0 GB per core threshold.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.24xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 96 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 192.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a 2.0 GB memory-per-core ratio. It operates with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading overhead. The instance lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This resource profile is designed for predictable, CPU-bound workloads. It is highly suited for batch processing, scientific simulations, video encoding, and compute-heavy web serving applications that require consistent, high-density processing power without massive memory footprints.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.24xlarge is a compute-optimized server with 96 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 192 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for high-throughput CPU-bound workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8a.24xlarge features 96 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 192 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps bandwidth for compute-intensive workloads.
tagline: A compute-optimized platform featuring ninety-six dedicated AMD EPYC cores and a two-gigabyte-per-core memory ratio for predictable CPU-bound workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
192.0 GB of system memory providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external data transfer
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
No hyperthreading with a strict 1.0 thread-per-core configuration
Suited for batch processing, video encoding, and scientific modeling
